 46:     """Bot statistics"""
 47:     total_comments: int
 48:     successful: int
 49:     failed: int
 50:     speed: float  # comments/second
 51:     total_time: float
 52:     sessions_used: int
 53:     profiles_used: int
 54:     parallel_workers: int
 55:     start_time: float
 56:     end_time: float
